description.ko: 디지털 글리치와 기하학적 파편화를 통해 질서와 혼돈이 충돌하는 건축적 붕괴의 순간을 포착했습니다.
description.en: A frozen moment of architectural collapse where order and chaos collide through digital glitch and geometric fragmentation.

prompt: A brutalist digital sculpture by KURO-X, titled 'The Voxel Defragmentation.' A massive #1A1A1A obsidian cube suspended in a sterile #FFFFFF void, undergoing a systematic geometric dissolution. The structure is being sliced by horizontal pixel-sorting layers and sharp RGB chromatic aberration, causing thousands of #808080 and #C0C0C0 razor-sharp polygonal shards to break away in a mathematical spiral. High-contrast ray-traced reflections on shifting obsidian planes intersect with digital scanlines. Unreal Engine 5 aesthetic, 8k resolution, capturing the cold elegance of systematic data corruption.
